Previously, the HiCache storage backend could only be configured at process startup. Changing the backend meant restarting the whole server, which hurts availability and makes operations clumsy.
This PR adds runtime attach/detach so operators can enable, disable, or switch the L3 storage

vllm.title: [FIX] Always support TP > 4 for FP4 Gemm
vllm.author: danielafrimi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR enables FP4 (NVFP4) quantization to work with TP  >=  4
Background
Previously, FP4 quantized models would fail to initialize with TP=4/8 due to kernel alignment requirements. The FlashInfer-CUTLASS FP4 GEMM kernels require the N/K-dimension to be divisible by 32.
Changes
This PR make

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Stop assuming 32 bit indexing
vllm.author: zou3519

Purpose
In PyTorch 2.10 we added a way for vLLM to assume 32 bit indexing and made it True by default. In PyTorch 2.9 the default was "don't assume 32 bit indexing".
We ran into some errors with this flag internally. Previously I thought this meant that we assume that the number of tokens is 32-bit,

vllm.title: [AMD][Kernel][BugFix] Use correct scale in concat_and_cache_ds_mla_kernel when on gfx942
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR updates concat_and_cache_ds_mla_kernel to use the correct scale divisor when running on gfx942 architectures on ROCm.  The tile_size divisor was 448.0 which does not work on AMD platforms with arch of gfx942, e.g. MI300, MI325.  This PR updates the divisor to be 224.0 on gfx942.
Addi
